title: Provide mentoring
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Provide mentoring demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for mentoring

pcs.text: Identify and confirm mentoring needs through consultation with appropriate personnel
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and confirm mentoring needs through consultation with appropriate personnel?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and confirm mentoring needs through consultation with appropriate personnel.

pcs.text: Match mentoring objectives to identified development needs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Match mentoring objectives to identified development needs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Match mentoring objectives to identified development needs.

pcs.text: Use effective communication styles to develop trust, confidence and rapport
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use effective communication styles to develop trust, confidence and rapport?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use effective communication styles to develop trust, confidence and rapport.

pcs.text: Plan and agree on the mentoring activities, taking location and availability into account
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Plan and agree on the mentoring activities, taking location and availability into account?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Plan and agree on the mentoring activities, taking location and availability into account.

pcs.text: Agree and document mentoring expectations and goals
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Agree and document mentoring expectations and goals?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Agree and document mentoring expectations and goals.

pcs.text: Seek input from relevant personnel if required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek input from relevant personnel if required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek input from relevant personnel if required.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for mentoring

elements.title: Provide mentoring support

pcs.text: Assist individual to identify and evaluate opportunities to achieve agreed goals and development activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assist individual to identify and evaluate opportunities to achieve agreed goals and development activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assist individual to identify and evaluate opportunities to achieve agreed goals and development activities.

pcs.text: Share personal experiences and knowledge with individuals to assist in progress to agreed goals and development
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Share personal experiences and knowledge with individuals to assist in progress to agreed goals and development?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Share personal experiences and knowledge with individuals to assist in progress to agreed goals and development.

pcs.text: Provide a supportive environment to allow individuals to progress towards achieving their goals
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide a supportive environment to allow individuals to progress towards achieving their goals?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide a supportive environment to allow individuals to progress towards achieving their goals.

pcs.text: Encourage individuals to make decisions and take responsibility for the courses of action or solutions under consideration
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Encourage individuals to make decisions and take responsibility for the courses of action or solutions under consideration?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Encourage individuals to make decisions and take responsibility for the courses of action or solutions under consideration.

pcs.text: Provide assistance and guidance in a manner that allows individuals to retain responsibility for achieving their goals
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide assistance and guidance in a manner that allows individuals to retain responsibility for achieving their goals?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide assistance and guidance in a manner that allows individuals to retain responsibility for achieving their goals.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Provide mentoring support

elements.title: Evaluate effectiveness of mentoring

pcs.text: Recognise and openly discuss changes in the mentoring relationship
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise and openly discuss changes in the mentoring relationship?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise and openly discuss changes in the mentoring relationship.

pcs.text: Make adjustments to the relationship to take account of the needs of both the mentor and the individual
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Make adjustments to the relationship to take account of the needs of both the mentor and the individual?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Make adjustments to the relationship to take account of the needs of both the mentor and the individual.

pcs.text: Seek feedback from the individual and other relevant personnel to identify and implement improvements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek feedback from the individual and other relevant personnel to identify and implement improvements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek feedback from the individual and other relevant personnel to identify and implement improvements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Evaluate effectiveness of mentoring

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
